name: Yakup Afsin
headline: I build secure, performant SaaS apps and cross-platform experiences.
summary: Full-stack developer with 7+ years' experience delivering scalable SaaS platforms, mobile apps, and web solutions using React.js, Node.js, GraphQL, and Postgres. Skilled in building secure, performant systems with clean architecture and rapid feature delivery. Experience spans mobile, web, POS systems, and AI-enhanced personal projects.
